notes: Quality gates passed (npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm test all passed). However, requirements review identified two blocking gaps in the e2e-pi-local-gemma acceptance criteria: (1) Verification used non-standard port 127.0.0.1:11435 instead of default localhost:11434; (2) Verification ran Pi directly with CLI flags rather than through a real Panopticon work-agent spawn (pan start/spawnAgent). The committed verification note at docs/PAN-1641-OLLAMA-VERIFY.md does not satisfy AC28 (work agent spawn) and AC29 (zero-cloud evidence on default endpoint). All other 31 ACs are implemented; only the e2e UAT path is incomplete.
